strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..atque ita discessit, luna sine aperta causa deleta.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_UTILITY_SHOTGUN_DESCRIPTI: Shotgun iacula pro <style=cIsDamage>14x140% damno</style>, te vi retroacta propellens.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_TYPHOONUNLOCKABLE_ACHIEVE: Ut Nemesis Henry, ludum vince aut te oblitera in Typhoon.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HENRY_MASTERYACHIEVEMENT: Ut Henry, ludum vince aut te oblitera in Monsoon.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_PRIMARY_SCEPBAZOOKA_DESCR:
Rachetam para et iacula pro <style=cIsDamage>600%-1600% damno</style>.
<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: Duas Bazookas simul tenere potes.</color>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_UTILITY_DODGESLASH_DESCRI: Retro salta, hostes propinquos caedens pro <style=cIsDamage>300% damno</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Dum saltas feriri non potes.</style>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_UTILITY_BLINKCSS_DESCRIPT:
<style=cIsHealing>5% Energiae.</style> <style=cIsUtility>Statim transi</style> ad hostem propinquum.
<style=cIsHealing>10% Energiae.</style> Explosum <style=cIsHealing>Energiae</style> emitte pro <style=cIsDamage>400% damno</style>.
strings.ROB_MRGREEN_BODY_DESCRIPTION:
Mr. Green<color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Gladius est utilis in plurimis rebus; Caestus Pugiles meliores sunt ad hostes validiores contundendos.

< ! > Pistola potens est contra hostes aereos, cum brevi mora et magno damno.

< ! > Volutatio munimentum armaturae paulisper relinquit et impetum audaciorem adiuvat.

< ! > Bomba turbas hostium facile delere potest.</color>
strings.ROB_MRGREEN_BODY_UTILITY_DASH_DESCRIPTIO: Breve spatium impelle. Cum <style=cIsUtility>clone</style> tangis, in aerem salis et valido <style=cIsUtility>cubiti ictu</style> descendes pro <style=cIsDamage>800% damno</style>.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_SPECIAL_SCEPBAZOOKA_DESCR:
Rachetas para et iacula pro <style=cIsDamage>600%-1600% damno</style>.
<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: Duas Bazookas simul tenere potes.</color>
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_SECONDARY_STINGER_DESCRIP: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis.</style> In hostem impetum fac pro <style=cIsDamage>450% damno</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_SECONDARY_TORRENT_DESCRIP: <style=cIsHealing>5% Energiae.</style> Seriem iaculorum <style=cIsHealing>Energiae</style> emitte. Tene ut pergat, plus <style=cIsHealing>Energiae</style> per iaculum consumens.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_DESCRIPTION:
Nemesis Henry est gladiator instabilis qui gladium singularem gerit, energiam servans ut impetus augeat. Moras ordinarias non habet, sed energiam sapienter regere debet.<color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Sword Mode energiam aedificat; Gun Mode energiam in impetus potentes consumit.

< ! > Swordmaster onerari potest ut plus damni faciat.

< ! > Flash Step instrumentum infestum potens est quod energiam aedificare adiuvat.

< ! > Hydra Bite utere ut sanus maneas et Hyper Beam ut magnum damnum effundas.</color>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..tam fortiter conatus est et tam longe pervenit. Sed in fine nihil refert.
strings.ROB_MRGREEN_BODY_SECONDARY_CLONETHROW_DE: Clonem invoca et ante iace, hostes propinquos rapiens et in terram pro <style=cIsDamage>420% damno</style> allidens.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Nemesis Henry arma speciale gerit quod inter Sword Mode et Gun Mode mutari potest. Artes eius moras ordinarias non habent; potius systemate <style=cIsHealing>Energiae</style> gladii nituntur.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_UTILITY_ROLL_DESCRIPTION: Breve spatium volve, accipiens <style=cIsUtility>300 armaturam</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Dum volveris feriri non potes.</style>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_PRIMARY_GUN_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsHealing>2.5% Energiae.</style> Iaculum penetrans <style=cIsHealing>Energiae</style> emitte pro <style=cIsDamage>240% damno</style>.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_SPECIAL_SCEPFRENZY_DESCRI:
<style=cIsHealth>Fury</style> ictibus collige. Utere cum plene oneratum est ut in <style=cIsDamage>furorem</style> ingrediaris per <style=cIsUtility>10 secundas</style>. <style=cIsHealth>Celerius oneratur cum valetudo minor est.</style>
<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: Boni statuum valde augentur. Duratio augetur.</color>
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HENRY_BODY_MASTERYUNLOCK: Ut Henry, ludum vince aut te oblitera in Monsoon.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_SPECIAL_BEAM_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsHealing>100% Energiae.</style> Potentem seriem laserum para quae <style=cIsDamage>10x540% damnum</style> facit.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_SPECIAL_SCEPBOMB_DESCRIPT:
Bombam iace pro <style=cIsDamage>1600% damno</style>.
<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: Usque ad 4 bombas tenere potes. Mora dimidiatur.</color>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_MASTERYUNLOCKABLE_ACHIEVE: Ut Nemesis Henry, ludum vince aut te oblitera in Monsoon.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_PRIMARY_BAZOOKA_DESCRIPTI: Rachetam para et iacula pro <style=cIsDamage>600%-1600% damno</style>.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_DANTEUNLOCKABLE_ACHIEVEME: Ut Henry, Twisted Scavenger in Monsoon vince.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HENRY_BODY_TYPHOONUNLOCK:
Ut Henry, ludum vince aut te oblitera in Typhoon aut Eclipse.
<color=#8888>(Computat quamlibet difficultatem Typhoon vel altiorem)</color>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_PRIMARY_SWORDCSS_DESCRIPT:
Lamina tua ante te caede pro <style=cIsDamage>280% damno</style>. In ictu <style=cIsHealing>20% Energiae</style> genera.
<style=cIsHealing>2.5% Energiae.</style> Iaculum penetrans <style=cIsHealing>Energiae</style> emitte pro <style=cIsDamage>240% damno</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_PRIMARY_SPEAR_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis.</style> Ante te punge pro <style=cIsDamage>160% damno</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Duplex damnum facit et <style=cIsHealing>50%</style> damni dati in cuspide sanat</style>.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_SPECIAL_FRENZY_DESCRIPTIO: <style=cIsHealth>Fury</style> ictibus collige. Utere cum plene oneratum est ut in <style=cIsDamage>furorem</style> ingrediaris per <style=cIsUtility>10 secundas</style>. <style=cIsHealth>Celerius oneratur cum valetudo minor est.</style>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_SPECIAL_STABCSS_DESCRIPTI:
<style=cIsHealing>100% Energiae.</style> Laminam tuam in hostem impinge pro <style=cIsDamage>2800% damno</style>, debuff potens inferens. <style=cIsHealing>Sana 50% damni dati.</style>
<style=cIsHealing>100% Energiae.</style> Radium potentem para qui <style=cIsDamage>multum damni</style> facit.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_UTILITY_BURST_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsHealing>10% Energiae.</style> Explosum <style=cIsHealing>Energiae</style> emitte pro <style=cIsDamage>400% damno</style>, <style=cIsUtility>te vi retroacta propellens</style>.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_DESCRIPTION:
Henricus est pugnator peritus qui lato armorum apparatu utitur ut hostes prosternat.<color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Gladius est utilis in plurimis rebus; Caestus Pugiles meliores sunt ad hostes validiores contundendos.

< ! > Pistola potens est contra hostes aereos, cum brevi mora et magno damno.

< ! > Volutatio munimentum armaturae paulisper relinquit et impetum audaciorem adiuvat.

< ! > Bomba turbas hostium facile delere potest.</color>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_SPECIAL_STAB_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsHealing>100% Energiae.</style> Laminam tuam in hostem impinge pro <style=cIsDamage>2800% damno</style>, debuff potens inferens. <style=cIsHealing>Sana 50% damni dati.</style>
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_SPECIAL_BAZOOKA_DESCRIPTI: Rachetas para et iacula pro <style=cIsDamage>600%-1600% damno</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_SECONDARY_CHARGE_DESCRIPT: <style=cIsHealing>10% Energiae.</style> In hostem propinquum impetum fac pro <style=cIsDamage>700% damno</style>. Si prope es, impetum compositum fac.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..atque ita evanuit, in perpetuum tabula rasa.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_VERGILUNLOCKABLE_ACHIEVEM: Ut Henry, King of Nothing sine rebus vince.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_SECONDARY_CHARGECSS_DESCR:
<style=cIsHealing>10% Energiae.</style> In hostem propinquum impetum fac pro <style=cIsDamage>700% damno</style>.
<style=cIsHealing>5% Energiae.</style> Seriem iaculorum <style=cIsHealing>Energiae</style> emitte.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_PRIMARY_SWORD_DESCRIPTION: Lamina tua ante te caede pro <style=cIsDamage>280% damno</style>. In ictu <style=cIsHealing>20% Energiae</style> genera.
strings.ROB_MRGREEN_BODY_PRIMARY_PUNCH_DESCRIPTI: Celerem seriem pugnis calcibusque fac pro <style=cIsDamage>90% damno</style>.
